revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月29日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 29일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月廿九]][[zh:正月廿九]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 29|qq=January 29}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}} the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Chōwa|en|Chōwa|qid=Q1194173|lt=Chōwa (era)|1=Chōwa}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1016|en|1016|qid=Q19247|lt=1016|1=1016}} {{ill|March 10|en|March 10|qid=Q2397|lt=March 10|1=March 10}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|en|Emperor Sanjō|qid=Q357231|lt=Emperor Sanjō|1=Emperor Sanjō}} abdicates in favor of Crown Prince {{ill|Atsunari|ja|敦成親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atsunari|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後一条天皇|1=Emperor Go-Ichijō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q374087}} , who becomes {{ill|Emperor Go-Ichijō|en|Emperor Go-Ichijō|qid=Q374087|lt=Emperor Go-Ichijō|1=Emperor Go-Ichijō}} . {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} assumes the position of {{ill|Sesshō|ja|Regent|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sesshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (regent).
* {{ill|Tenshō (Heian period)|en|Tenshō (Heian period)|qid=Q550527|lt=Tenshō|1=Tenshō (Heian period)}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1131|en|1131|qid=Q19579|lt=1131|1=1131}} {{ill|February 28|en|February 28|qid=Q2362|lt=February 28|1=February 28}} ) – Due to droughts and other calamities, the era name changes from {{ill|Daiji (era)|en|Daiji (era)|qid=Q1037046|lt=Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (era)}} to Tenshō.
* {{ill|Kenmu|en|Kenmu|qid=Q1193970|lt=Kenmu|1=Kenmu}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1334|en|1334|qid=Q6007|lt=1334|1=1334}} {{ill|March 5|en|March 5|qid=Q2392|lt=March 5|1=March 5}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|qid=Q1194556|lt=Genkō (Japan)|1=Genkō (1331–1334)}} to Kenmu.
* {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 11 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1634|en|1634|qid=Q6872|lt=1634|1=1634}} {{ill|February 26|en|February 26|qid=Q2359|lt=February 26|1=February 26}} ) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} establishes the {{ill|Daimyō firefighting corps|ja|大名火消|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daimyō firefighting corps|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 火消|1=Hikeshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11566931}} .
* {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|March 8|en|March 8|qid=Q2395|lt=March 8|1=March 8}} ) – The Meiji government conducts Japan’s first modern population census, reporting a total population of 33.11 million.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Jōtoku|en|Jōtoku|qid=Q1193901|lt=Jōtoku|1=Jōtoku}} 1 (Intercalary January) (Julian {{ill|1097|en|1097|qid=Q19488|lt=1097|1=1097}} {{ill|March 15|en|March 15|qid=Q2403|lt=March 15|1=March 15}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Tadamichi|en|Fujiwara no Tadamichi|qid=Q1354407|lt=Fujiwara no Tadamichi|1=Fujiwara no Tadamichi}} , {{ill|Sesshō|ja|Regent|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sesshō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Kampaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kampaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1199966}} (+ {{ill|1164|en|1164|qid=Q19674|lt=1164|1=1164}} ).
* {{ill|Einin|en|Einin|qid=Q1327307|lt=Einin|1=Einin}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1293|en|1293|qid=Q5557|lt=1293|1=1293}} {{ill|March 8|en|March 8|qid=Q2395|lt=March 8|1=March 8}} ) – {{ill|Kitabatake Chikafusa|en|Kitabatake Chikafusa|qid=Q683792|lt=Kitabatake Chikafusa|1=Kitabatake Chikafusa}} , {{ill|Kugyō|1=Kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|ja|Kugyō|1=Kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3138036}} (+ {{ill|1354|en|1354|qid=Q6118|lt=1354|1=1354}} ).
* {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun (era)|1=Kanbun (era)}} 9 (Gregorian {{ill|1669|en|1669|qid=Q7602|lt=1669|1=1669}} {{ill|March 1|en|March 1|qid=Q2393|lt=March 1|1=March 1}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Masakata|en|Matsudaira Masakata|qid=Q11239143|lt=Matsudaira Masatomo|1=Matsudaira Masakata}} , lord of {{ill|Aizu Domain|1=Aizu Domain|2=ja|3=会津藩|ja|Aizu Domain|1=Aizu Domain|2=ja|3=会津藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aizu Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4389944}} (+ {{ill|1731|en|1731|qid=Q6963|lt=1731|1=1731}} ).
* {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}} {{ill|March 17|en|March 17|qid=Q2419|lt=March 17|1=March 17}} ) – {{ill|Kikuchi Dairoku|ja|菊地大麓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kikuchi Dairoku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 菊池大麓|1=Kikuchi Dairoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q976582}} , {{ill|Mathematician|en|Mathematician|qid=Q170790|lt=mathematician|1=Mathematician}} (+ {{ill|1917|en|1917|qid=Q2092|lt=1917|1=1917}} ).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Ōan|en|Ōan|qid=Q1146245|lt=Ōan era|1=Ōan}} 7 / {{ill|Bunchū|en|Bunchū|qid=Q1194181|lt=Bunchū (Japan)|1=Bunchū}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1374|en|1374|qid=Q6269|lt=1374|1=1374}} {{ill|March 12|en|March 12|qid=Q2402|lt=March 12|1=March 12}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Kōgon|en|Emperor Go-Kōgon|qid=Q555465|lt=Emperor Go-Kōgon|1=Emperor Go-Kōgon}} , the 4th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Court|en|Northern Court|qid=Q1201819|lt=Northern Court (Japan)|1=Northern Court}} (* {{ill|1338|en|1338|qid=Q6044|lt=1338|1=1338}} ).
== Commemorations ==
* {{ill|Misoka Shōgatsu|ja|晦日正月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misoka Shōgatsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (if this is the last day of the month).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|28|1|30|12|29|2|1|0129|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
